name: Aunt Mary's Hot Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stem and seeds from peppers. Wear rubber gloves and/or wash hands after.
2. Rub the hot peppers with olive oil until they are evenly coated.
3. Add the chopped garlic to a large pan or skillet and heat over medium-low heat for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until fragrant.
4. Crush 2-3 of the Italian plum tomatoes using a fork or potato masher and add them to the pan with the peppers and garlic.
5. Continue sautéing the mixture for another 20 minutes, stirring frequently, until the peppers are tender and well-coated in oil.
6. Season with salt to taste.
